mapper.select:
SELECT record_id, part_id, document_code, part_code, part_name, move_type, source_type, target_type, supplier_or_dept, receiver, quantity, before_stock, after_stock, ref_type, ref_id, ref_no, operator_name, operate_date, storage_location, create_time, remark FROM dms_spare_part_record
AND part_id = #{partId} AND part_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{partCode}, '%') AND part_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{partName}, '%') AND move_type = #{moveType} AND move_type != '0' AND document_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{documentCode}, '%') AND source_type = #{sourceType} AND target_type = #{targetType} AND supplier_or_dept LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierOrDept}, '%')
ORDER BY record_id DESC
SELECT document_code FROM dms_spare_part_record WHERE document_code LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%') ORDER BY document_code DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM dms_spare_part_record WHERE record_id IN #{recordId}
